kiroAgent.trustedCommands: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');const s=[...h.matchAll(/<script(?![^>]*\bsrc=)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]);let i=0;for(const c of s){i++;try{new Function(c);}catch(e){if(!/await is only valid|return outside|import|export/.test(e.message)){console.log('SCRIPT '+i+' ERROR:',e.message);}}}console.log('checked',s.length,'inline scripts');"

node -e "function eco(cap,dist,demand,sat){const carried=Math.min(demand,cap);const fare=110+dist*26;const f=Math.pow(0.5,sat);const rev=Math.round(carried*fare*f);const cost=Math.round(cap*dist*22+800);return rev-cost;} const cap=12,dist=2.2,dem=200; for(let s=0;s<5;s++) console.log('LON-MAN flight #' + (s+1) + ' net:', eco(cap,dist,dem,s));"

powershell -Command "Write-Output '--- root ---'; Get-ChildItem -File | Select-Object Name; Write-Output '--- libs ---'; Get-ChildItem libs -File | Select-Object Name; Write-Output '--- air ---'; (Get-ChildItem air -File).Count; Write-Output '--- textures ---'; Get-ChildItem textures -File | Select-Object Name; Write-Output '--- flags count ---'; (Get-ChildItem flags -File).Count"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');function walk(d,b){for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const n=e.name;if(/[\s\u0400-\u04FF]/.test(n))console.log('BAD NAME:',b+'/'+n);if(e.isDirectory())walk(d+'/'+n,b+'/'+n);}}walk('.','.');console.log('name check done');"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');let t=0;function walk(d){for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=d+'/'+e.name;if(e.isDirectory())walk(p);else t+=fs.statSync(p).size;}}walk('.');console.log('total MB:',(t/1048576).toFixed(2));"

powershell -Command "$f = Get-Item 'flags\fi.png'; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile($f.FullName); Write-Output ('fi.png ' + $img.Width + 'x' + $img.Height + ' ' + $f.Length + ' bytes'); $img.Dispose()"
